subcodes.first_line: O Rustam! Beseech thou the Most Pure Lord, that thou mayest become the mighty hero of that gathering, and like unto Rustam himself, be clad in valor and armor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم از یزدان پاک نیاز کن که تهمتن آن انجمن گردی و رستم با خود و جوشن شوی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
